title: Grocery Ordering/Delivery - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Grocery Ordering/Delivery 9 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The 211info SNAP and Food Access program provides specialized information, referral, advocacy, follow-up services, and extra guidance to individuals and family members who would like to access the SNAP program, have a question or issue with their current SNAP case, and/or need extra guidance accessing food resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details JOSEPHINE COUNTY FARM COLLECTIVE MARKETPLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides locally grown food, cut flowers, and animal fiber. Limited alternative pick up and delivery options may be available. 485 Daily Lane Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Order request: Sunday 6am-Wednesday 6am Farm stand pick up: November-April Tuesday 3pm-6pm, May-October 4pm-7pm Alternative pick up locations/Delivery: Wednesday 8am-5pm locations vary Email (503) 304-3754 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MADRAS COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY HOME FOOD DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Delivers food to homebound individuals unable to visit the food pantry. Delivery is within an 11 mile radius of Madras. 370 SW Culver Highway Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities who are homebound Hours: 3rd Thursday of the month by appointment Email (541) 325-1747 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NAACP EUGENE-SPRINGFIELD MIMS HOUSE FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food box home delivery for community members. 330 High Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; must live within a 10 mile radius of the food pantry Hours: Office: Tuesday-Friday 11am-1pm Delivery: Tuesday-Friday noon-1:30pm; submit form to request a delivery day Email (541) 484-1119 , Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORIMPACT REDMOND OFFICE FRESH EXPRESS HOME DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mobile pantry delivery. Items can include fresh fruit, vegetables, and shelf stable items. 2303 SW 1st Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Households that are not able to attend an in-person mobile pantry Hours: Friday delivery times vary Email (541) 548-2380 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY HOME DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides delivery of food items, including canned goods, dairy, grains, produce, and meat. Household items such as diapers and wipes, pet supplies, laundry detergent, cleaning supplies, and paper products may be available when supply allows. Preordering is available online in multiple languages, and navigators can assist those who need help with the ordering process. 3223 SE 92nd Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Age 60 and older or age 18 and older with disabilities Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 427-8741 Get Directions Visit Website More Details STORE TO DOOR GROCERY DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides low-cost, volunteer-based shopping and delivery of groceries, prescriptions, and household supplies on a weekly basis. Clients are matched with a volunteer order taker who will call each week to take their order. Seniors enrolled in Oregon Project Independence (OPI) may qualify for a reduced fees. 7730 SW 31st Avenue Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Age 65 and older and adults with disabilities who are homebound or unable to shop for themselves Hours: Order taking: Monday-Tuesday 9am-3pm Shopping/Delivery: Wednesday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (503) 200-3333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SUNSHINE DIVISION SUNSHINE DIVISION FRONT AVENUE FOOD BOX HOME DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food boxes via a delivery service. The service is first-come, first-served, and assistance is not guaranteed. Individuals may receive up to two food boxes per month. 2121 NW Front Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: -Individuals who are homebound, medically fragile, experiencing transportation issues, or otherwise unable to leave the home -Live within a 10 mile radius of either the Stark Street or Front Avenue location Hours: Registration: Monday until capacity is reached Delivery: Monday and Wednesday mornings Email (503) 300-5738 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SUNSHINE DIVISION SUNSHINE DIVISION STARK STREET FOOD BOX HOME DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food boxes via a delivery service. The service is first-come, first-served, and assistance is not guaranteed. Individuals may receive up to two food boxes per month. 12436 SE Stark Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: -Individuals who are homebound, medically fragile, experiencing transportation issues, or otherwise unable to leave the home -Live within a 10 mile radius of either the Stark Street or Front Avenue location Hours: Registration: Monday until capacity is reached Delivery: Monday and Wednesday mornings Email (503) 300-5738 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JOSEPHINE COUNTY FARM COLLECTIVE MARKETPLACE MADRAS COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY HOME FOOD DELIVERY NAACP EUGENE-SPRINGFIELD MIMS HOUSE FOOD PANTRY NEIGHBORIMPACT FRESH EXPRESS HOME DELIVERY PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY HOME DELIVERY STORE TO DOOR GROCERY DELIVERY SUNSHINE DIVISION FOOD BOX HOME DELIVERY SUNSHINE DIVISION FOOD BOX HOME DELIVERY
